subject: Escalation: siamese blockers for Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-7997
body: Following yesterday's call, the siamese effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Ada Lovelace seems to disagree with Nikola Tesla on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-7997. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
